title: At the Airport

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: صَبَاحُ الْخَيْرِ، أُرِيدُ تَسْجِيلَ حُقُوبِي لِرِحْلَةِ أَمْسْتَرْدَامَ.
lines.bs: Dobro jutro, želim prijaviti prtljag za let za Amsterdam.
lines.en: Good morning, I want to check in my luggage for the Amsterdam flight.

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: صَبَاحُ النُّورِ! مِنْ فَضْلِكَ أَعْطِنِي جَوَازَ سَفَرِكَ وَبِطَاقَةَ الصُّعُودِ.
lines.bs: Dobro jutro! Molim vas, dajte mi pasoš i kartu za ukrcavanje.
lines.en: Good morning! Please give me your passport and boarding pass.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: تَفَضَّلْ جَوَازَ سَفَرِي. لَمْ أَطْبَعْ بِطَاقَةَ الصُّعُودِ، هَلْ يُمْكِنُنِي اسْتِخْدَامُ الْهَاتِفِ؟
lines.bs: Izvolite moj pasoš. Nisam ispisao kartu za ukrcavanje, mogu li koristiti telefon?
lines.en: Here is my passport. I did not print the boarding pass, can I use my phone?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: نَعَمْ، بِإِمْكَانِكَ اسْتِخْدَامُ الْبِطَاقَةِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ عَلَى هَاتِفِكَ. كَمْ حَقِيبَةً مَعَكَ؟
lines.bs: Da, možete koristiti digitalnu kartu na telefonu. Koliko kofera imate?
lines.en: Yes, you can use the digital boarding pass on your phone. How many bags do you have?

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: لَدَيَّ حَقِيبَةٌ وَاحِدَةٌ كَبِيرَةٌ وَشَنْطَةٌ صَغِيرَةٌ لِلْيَدِ.
lines.bs: Imam jedan veliki kofer i jednu malu ručnu torbu.
lines.en: I have one large bag and one small hand bag.

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: حَسَنًا، ضَعِ الْحَقِيبَةَ الْكَبِيرَةَ عَلَى الْمِيزَانِ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ. وَزْنُهَا اثْنَانِ وَعِشْرُونَ كِيلُوغْرَامًا، هَذَا مَقْبُولٌ.
lines.bs: Dobro, stavite veliki kofer na vagu, molim. Teži dvadeset i dva kilograma, to je prihvatljivo.
lines.en: Very well, please put the large bag on the scale. It weighs twenty-two kilograms, that is acceptable.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ. مَا رَقْمُ الْبَوَّابَةِ لِرِحْلَتِي؟
lines.bs: Hvala Bogu. Koji je broj izlaza za moj let?
lines.en: Thank God. What is the gate number for my flight?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: بَوَّابَتُكَ هِيَ رَقْمُ أَرْبَعَةَ عَشَرَ فِي الطَّابِقِ الثَّانِي. يُمْكِنُكَ رُؤْيَةُ اللَّافِتَاتِ.
lines.bs: Vaš izlaz je broj četrnaest na drugom spratu. Možete pratiti table.
lines.en: Your gate is number fourteen on the second floor. You can follow the signs.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: شُكْرًا. مَتَى يَبْدَأُ الصُّعُودُ إِلَى الطَّائِرَةِ؟
lines.en: Thank you. When does boarding begin?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: يَبْدَأُ الصُّعُودُ السَّاعَةَ الثَّانِيَةَ عَشَرَةَ وَالنِّصْفَ. لَدَيْكَ وَقْتٌ كَافٍ.
lines.bs: Ukrcavanje počinje u dvanaest i po. Imate dovoljno vremena.
lines.en: Boarding begins at twelve thirty. You have enough time.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: هَلْ يَجِبُ أَنْ أَكُونَ فِي الْبَوَّابَةِ قَبْلَ الصُّعُودِ بِوَقْتٍ طَوِيلٍ؟
lines.bs: Moram li biti na izlazu dugo prije ukrcavanja?
lines.en: Do I need to be at the gate a long time before boarding?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: يُنْصَحُ بِالْوُصُولِ إِلَى الْبَوَّابَةِ قَبْلَ الصُّعُودِ بِثَلَاثِينَ دَقِيقَةً عَلَى الْأَقَلِّ.
lines.bs: Preporučuje se doći na izlaz najmanje trideset minuta prije ukrcavanja.
lines.en: It is recommended to arrive at the gate at least thirty minutes before boarding.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: فَهِمْتُ. هَلْ يَجِبُ أَنْ أَمُرَّ بِالْأَمْنِ أَوَّلًا؟
lines.bs: Razumijem. Moram li prvo proći sigurnosnu kontrolu?
lines.en: I understand. Do I need to go through security first?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: نَعَمْ، نُقْطَةُ الأَمْنِ عَلَى يَمِينِكَ. رِحْلَةً مُوَفَّقَةً وَسَفَرًا آمِنًا!
lines.bs: Da, sigurnosna kontrola je na vašoj desnoj strani. Sretan put i siguran let!
lines.en: Yes, the security checkpoint is on your right. Have a successful trip and a safe journey!

grammarFocus: future tense with سَـ and imperative mood
